stemHtml: You lose fuel indication during a flight, what is the best course of action?

options.a: Open the cross-feed valve to make sure the aeroplane stays in balance.
options.b: Recycle the circuit breakers provided it is part of the procedure.
options.c: Land as soon as possible and prepare for power off landing.
options.d: Turn off fuel pumps for 10 min and then turn them back on hoping fuel indications come back.
